entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers containing nitrogen used to provide nutrients to crops.

entities.name: REACTIVE NITROGEN
entities.description: Forms of nitrogen that are chemically active and can be released into the environment.

entities.name: AMMONIA VOLATILIZATION
entities.description: The loss of nitrogen to the atmosphere as ammonia gas.

entities.name: NITRATE LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of nitrate from the soil profile due to water movement.

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a crop takes up and utilizes nitrogen from fertilizers.

entities.name: CROP NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of optimizing the application of nutrients to crops.

entities.name: SMART NITROGEN FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Advanced fertilizer technologies designed to improve nutrient delivery and efficiency.

entities.name: ZEOLITES
entities.description: Aluminosilicate minerals used as soil amendments and carrier materials for fertilizers.

entities.name: SLOW RELEASE FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers designed to release nutrients gradually over time.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area.

entities.name: WATER HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil or a material to retain water.

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and water scarcity.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage.

entities.name: MACRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential nutrients required by plants in large quantities.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential nutrients required by plants in small quantities.

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soils that lack sufficient essential nutrients for optimal plant growth.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of crop yield to the amount of water used.
